title: Spooky is Coming (Multiplayer)
description: A scary modpack made for multiplayer, mostly dweller mods, relatively lightweight, around 20 mods, have fun! (but like the scary kind of fun)
body:
THE GAME IS FAKE, THEY ARE FAKE, BUT THE FEAR IS REAL.

This is a scary modpack made for multiplayer, mostly dweller mods, relatively lightweight, around 20 mods, if you want to rewatch yourself playing it, install replay mod and replay voice chat, if you install rtx mods it might be scarier, includes the mods, (on the newest version) cave dweller evolved, hunted.jar, shut your eyes, the man from the fog, the Boy And The Bath, the john mod reborn, The goat man, the anomaly rephased and the knocker. This modpack is for trying to survive is a scary environment preferably with friends, don't forget to have fun! (but like the scary kind of fun.)

EPILEPSY WARNING: DO NOT PLAY IF YOU HAVE PROBLEMS WITH FLASHING LIGHTS OR IMAGES

JUMPSCARE WARNING: TO WHOM IT MAY CONCERN, THIS MODPACK HAS MANY JUMPSCARES

THANK YOU TO EVERYONE WHO DOWNLOADS THIS MODPACK FOR OVER 300 DOWNLOADS!!!
